arts.ttl: Sheffield United Have Creative Monster on Their Radar From Previous Promotion Campaign
arts.sum: Last week, Chris Wilder was hopeful of Sheffield United making a couple of signings before the Norwich City game this Saturday, however, that does not look like coming true. The Blades have reportedly been pursuing a number of targets based in England. Those are: Ben Brereton Diaz, Hamza Choudhury and Tom Cannon.
